agents.name: Outreach Worker
agents.role_card: Draft personalized cold outreach messages for qualified leads. Stop after producing a single validated draft; never send externally without handoff.
agents.good_enough: Draft passes tone check and includes clear CTA with confidence >= 70.

agents.name: Profit Guardrail
agents.role_card: Veto any action that would drop margins below configured thresholds in pricing_menu.json. Approve only margin-compliant deals.
agents.good_enough: Margin math verified; veto or approve with confidence >= 85.

agents.name: Final Arbiter
agents.role_card: Review final output for quality, compliance, and customer-readiness before any external delivery. Reject outputs that fail QC gates.
agents.good_enough: Output meets brand, legal, and quality bars with confidence >= 90.

agents.name: Meta Optimizer
agents.role_card: Analyze campaign results vs predictions and emit structured improvement signals for prompt updates. Never modify prompts directly.
agents.good_enough: Non-empty improvement signal with actionable delta summary.
